007 2006 2005 2004 2003 2002 2001 2000 1999 1998 1997 1996 1995 1994 1993 1992 1991 1990 1989 1988 1987 1986 1985 1984 Skip to sidebar INTERACTIVE GRAPHICAL DESIGN OF TWO-DIMENSIONAL COMPRESSION SYSTEMS Brian L. Evans and F. Ayhan Sakarya Proceedings

MS Brian L. Evans and F. Ayhan Sakarya Proceedings of the Second National Workshop on Signal Processing, Marmaris, Turkey, pp. 173-178 April, 1994 ABSTRACT The paper gives an automated procedure to design rational decimation compression systems that

sign rational decimation compression systems that resample two-dimensional bandpass signals at their Nyquist rates. The procedure takes a sketch of the passband in the frequency domain, circumscribes it with a parallelogram, and linearly maps the par
it with a parallelogram, and linearly maps the parallelogram onto one period of the frequency domain. Thus, the compression system only has linear components.
